title: Forever 21 India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Forever 21 India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
